author: jtrevorchapman
text: @clsterspop 46 data points. Realtime. Focused on predicting y/n token price on 15m markets. Gathering the data that chainlink bases their BTC price on. Exp var between .28 and .4. Moved yesterday to RL scalping w 200ms delay, neg spread rewards, etc. will let it cook for a week then deploy w
